{{Quote|Impartiality is one thing. Blindness is another entirely|translated=1|Judge Duula to [[Jolee Bindo]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Duula''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] who lived in [[Ahto City]] on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] before and during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He was a judge on the [[Ahto City Civil Authority]] court, and a strong advocate for the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]]. Duula believed that the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was in stagnation; he saw the Sith as a fresh change-of-pace. He, along with his fellow judges, presided over the case involving the murder of [[Elassa Huros]], in which the amnesiac [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] served as [[Arbiter/Legends|Arbiter]] for the defendant, [[Sunry]].

Duula would also be present for the trial of Revan and his companions after his raid on the [[Sith Embassy]], as well as when he emerged from the [[Republic Embassy (Manaan)|Republic Embassy]] after his trip to the Republic's [[Hrakert Station]] to find the [[Star Map]] hidden on the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] floor.

==Appearances==
